_comment: Ground-truth latest GA versions for NetApp products. Updated by daily Reference Library scan (0 8 * * *). Edit this file manually if the scan agent identifies a newer GA release not yet reflected here. See CHANGELOG.md in the Reference Library for authoritative update history.

_sources.storageGrid: Cloud-BlueXP/README.md — storagegrid/release-notes/ verified 2026-07-22 (12.1 announced 2026-06-23, docs not yet live)
_sources.spBmcByModel: Platforms-Hardware/Firmware-Versions.md — direct-fetch-confirmed via public KB CONTAP-* issue summaries 2026-07-23. Per-family independent version tracks; not exhaustive — gap flag: AFX and unlisted families require Hardware Universe/Support Site.

santricity.note: SANtricity OS (E-Series). Verify via mysupport.netapp.com/site/downloads/eseries — requires NetApp Support login.

spBmc._comment: SP/BMC firmware is hardware model-specific. NetApp best practice: always run the latest available version regardless of ONTAP release. The ONTAP-bundled catalog baseline is NOT the same as the globally latest available firmware.
spBmc.validationNote: Firmware currency cannot be confirmed without live API data. Validate installed version via ONTAP CLI: 'system service-processor show'. Download latest from mysupport.netapp.com/site/downloads.

SP.note: AFF/FAS Service Processor firmware — model-specific, verify via mysupport.netapp.com

BMC.note: AFF A-series / ASA / AFX Baseboard Management Controller firmware — model-specific, verify via mysupport.netapp.com

BIOS.note: System BIOS — bundled with ONTAP releases; verify via mysupport.netapp.com for standalone updates

_phase2_byPlatformFamily._gapFlag: Table covers families with discoverable public KB entries only (CONTAP-* issue summaries, direct-fetch-confirmed 2026-07-23). NOT exhaustive. AFX BMC-equivalent and unlisted families require Hardware Universe / mysupport.netapp.com. Each family has an INDEPENDENT version track — do NOT compare version numbers across families. 'mostRecentFound' entries may have newer unreleased updates.

families.label: AFF A1K, A90, A70, C80 / ASA A1K, A90, A70 / FAS90, FAS70
AFF A250, C250 / ASA A250, C250 / FAS500f
AFF A800, C800 / ASA A800, C800

storageGridAppliance._comment: StorageGRID appliance node firmware (BMC, drive controllers, expansion card firmware) is managed through the StorageGRID Appliance Installer and Grid Manager. No unified firmware version matrix is available via public API or ActiveIQ — versions are hardware-model-specific and require authenticated access to mysupport.netapp.com to verify.
storageGridAppliance.validationNote: Validate appliance firmware via Grid Manager → Nodes → [Appliance Node] → Hardware tab. For detailed firmware info use SANtricity System Manager (E-Series-based SG nodes) or the Appliance Installer page (SG6160, SGF6112, SG6000, SG5800, etc.). Download latest from mysupport.netapp.com.

firmwareComponents.computeController: Runs StorageGRID Appliance Installer + node OS. Validate via Appliance Installer or Grid Manager Hardware tab.
firmwareComponents.storageController: E-Series-derived storage controllers (SANtricity) in SG6x60/SG5x60 appliances — validate via SANtricity System Manager embedded in the appliance.
firmwareComponents.bmc: Appliance-specific BMC — validate via Grid Manager Hardware tab or appliance out-of-band management interface.
firmwareComponents.drives: Drive firmware validated via SANtricity Upgrade Center (storage-controller appliances) or Grid Manager for compute-only nodes.

eSeriesFirmware._comment: E-Series / EF-Series component firmware independent of SANtricity OS (controller firmware). Drive firmware, cache backup device (CBD/BBU), and expansion module firmware all have separate version tracks.
eSeriesFirmware.validationNote: Validate all E-Series component firmware via SANtricity System Manager → Upgrade Center → View/Update Firmware. Download latest from mysupport.netapp.com/site/downloads/eseries — requires NetApp Support login.
eSeriesFirmware.santricitySystemManager: Upgrade Center → View/Update Firmware (controller, drive, and CBD/BBU firmware all tracked here)

firmwareComponents.controllerFirmware: SANtricity OS/Controller Firmware (8.xx/7.xx — see 'santricity' key above for latest GA). This IS the primary OS-level version.
firmwareComponents.driveFirmware: Per-drive-model firmware. Model-specific — no public current-version matrix. See NetApp E/EF-Series Disk Drive and Firmware Matrix (authenticated). Validate via SANtricity System Manager → Upgrade Center → Drive Firmware.
firmwareComponents.cbdFirmware: Cache Backup Device (CBD/BBU) firmware — model-specific. Validate via SANtricity System Manager → Upgrade Center.
firmwareComponents.nvsramVersion: Controller NVSRAM defines controller configuration settings and must match the SANtricity OS version. Always upgrade NVSRAM when upgrading controller firmware.
firmwareComponents.expansionModule: Expansion Enclosure Module (ESM/IOM) firmware — separate version track from controller firmware. Validate via SANtricity System Manager.

diskFirmware._comment: Drive (disk) firmware is drive model-specific. NetApp best practice: always run the latest available drive firmware. Currency can only be confirmed against live fleet data from ActiveIQ or manual CLI comparison.
diskFirmware.validationNote: Validate via ONTAP CLI: 'storage disk show -fields firmware-revision'. Download latest Disk Qualification Package (DQP) and drive firmware from mysupport.netapp.com.

shelfFirmware._comment: Shelf module firmware (IOM, NSM, ESM) is module-model-specific. NetApp best practice: always run the latest available shelf firmware.
shelfFirmware.validationNote: Validate via ONTAP CLI: 'storage shelf show -fields module-type,fw-version'. Download latest from mysupport.netapp.com.
